name: @annoyingmouse/wc-month-year-date
description: A form-associated web component for selecting a month and year.

scripts.release: npm run build && node scripts/sync-version.cjs && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: release artifacts" && git push && git push --tags && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run release

author: Dominic Myers
